mapper.select: SELECT u.avatar, u.real_name AS realName, u.iphone AS phone, uc.student_id AS studentId, -- 从认证表获取学号 IFNULL(uc.status, -1) AS authStatus, CASE IFNULL(uc.status, -1) WHEN 0 THEN 'warning' WHEN 1 THEN 'success' WHEN 2 THEN 'danger' ELSE 'info' END AS authType, DATE_FORMAT(u.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS registerTime FROM user u LEFT JOIN user_certification uc ON u.id = uc.user_id AND uc.cert_type = 'student' ORDER BY u.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
select u.avatar, u.username, u.role, u.total_rentals, u.total_mileage, u.points, u.balance, u.real_name, u.iphone, u.email, u.driving_license from user u where id = #{id};
